title: Heartbeat Report Compact Failure Rollup
summary: Add one-line failed-lane summary to heartbeat-facing health output to improve operational visibility
root_issue: heartbeat reports lack compact failure rollup
desired_change: add one-line failed-lane summary to heartbeat-facing health output
requested_action: Implement compact failure rollup in heartbeat health output

evidence.heartbeat_analysis: failure detection scattered across log reading
evidence.operational_impact: operators spend excessive time parsing heartbeat failures

recommendation.success_criteria: heartbeat failures visible in one-line summary

trigger_reason: cross-agent knowledge sync revealed duplicate heartbeat failure detection patterns
precedent_gap: heartbeat visibility depends on log reading instead of direct display
